case_title: JONES ANTHONY VS S & J S AUTO BODY & TRUCK REPAIR

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S & J S AUTO BODY & TRUCK REPAIR $440.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $468.00, PLFT FAILED TO PROVE THE CAR WAS STOLEN. THE CT. FINDS THAT THE CAR WAS ULTIMATELY TOWED TO CITY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
